## setSearchedQueriesInPopularSearches variable

Sets the popular searches state `searchedQueries` with the list of history queries.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
setSearchedQueriesInPopularSearches: import("../..").Wire<import("@empathyco/x-types").HistoryQuery[]>
```
